bundled.title: Harry Potter: Core
bundled.description: Reusable Hogwarts, magical Britain, school-cycle, and world-rule scaffolding for Harry Potter Golden Trio Loredecks.

bundled.title: Harry Potter Year 1: Philosopher's Stone
bundled.description: Year 1 Golden Trio Loredeck for Philosopher's Stone, from pre-Hogwarts discovery through the Stone incident aftermath.

bundled.title: Harry Potter Year 2: Chamber of Secrets
bundled.description: Year 2 Golden Trio Loredeck for Dobby, the Chamber attacks, Polyjuice investigation, and the basilisk climax.

bundled.title: Harry Potter Year 3: Prisoner of Azkaban
bundled.description: Year 3 Golden Trio Loredeck for Sirius, Dementors, Hogsmeade, Patronus training, Buckbeak, and the Time-Turner rescue.

bundled.title: Harry Potter Year 4: Goblet of Fire
bundled.description: Year 4 Golden Trio Loredeck for the Quidditch World Cup, Triwizard Tournament, graveyard return, and Voldemort aftermath.

bundled.title: Harry Potter Year 5: Order of the Phoenix
bundled.description: Year 5 Golden Trio Loredeck for Ministry denial, Umbridge, Dumbledore’s Army, Occlumency, OWLs, and the Department of Mysteries.

bundled.title: Harry Potter Year 6: Half-Blood Prince
bundled.description: Year 6 Golden Trio Loredeck for Slughorn, the Prince book, Draco suspicion, Apparition lessons, Horcrux memory, Sectumsempra, and the Tower crisis.

bundled.title: Harry Potter Year 7: Deathly Hallows
bundled.description: Year 7 Golden Trio Loredeck for the Seven Potters, Horcrux hunt, Hallows, Malfoy Manor, Shell Cottage, Gringotts, Hogwarts return, and Battle of Hogwarts.

bundled.title: Harry Potter: Post-War Years & Epilogue
bundled.description: Post-war Golden Trio Loredeck for wizarding reconstruction, Ministry reforms, Harry as an Auror, the 2014 Quidditch World Cup, and the 2017 new-generation platform scene.
